with:
  # Group triples by subject for better sentence construction
      subject_triples: dict[str, list[Triple]] = {}
      for t in triples:
          if t.subject not in subject_triples:
              subject_triples[t.subject] = []
          subject_triples[t.subject].append(t)
  
      # Create a mapping from subject to the main celestial body
      # This helps identify which subject is the primary one
      main_subject = None
      for subj, tlist in subject_triples.items():
          # Prefer celestial body subjects (contain numbers or are known celestial patterns)
          if any(c.isdigit() for c in subj) or any(kw in subj.lower() for kw in ['helena', 'gaussia...
              main_subject = subj
              break
      if main_subject is None and subject_triples:
          main_subject = list(subject_triples.keys())[0]
